hero.title: Professional Business Email
hero.subtitle: Look professional with an email address that matches your domain. Hosted on secure, ad-free enterprise servers.

plans.title: Simple, transparent pricing
plans.subtitle: Choose the plan that fits your team.

features.title: Everything you need in your inbox

f1.title: Custom Domain Email
f1.desc: Create yourname@yourbusiness.com and look instantly professional.

f2.title: 99.9% Uptime
f2.desc: Your email is always on — redundant servers keep you connected.

f3.title: Spam & Virus Protection
f3.desc: Enterprise-grade filtering keeps your inbox clean and secure.

f4.title: Calendar & Contacts
f4.desc: Shared calendars, address books, and task management built in.

f5.title: Mobile & Desktop Apps
f5.desc: Access your email from any device using our native apps or webmail.

f6.title: Email Aliases
f6.desc: Create unlimited aliases — info@, support@, sales@ — all in one account.

f7.title: Migration Assistance
f7.desc: We'll migrate your existing emails from Gmail, Outlook, or any provider.

f8.title: 2FA Security
f8.desc: Two-factor authentication protects your account from unauthorized access.

cta.title: Your professional email is waiting
cta.subtitle: Set up takes under 5 minutes. Your email, your brand.
